note: Tests/harness counts are as reported by the cycle that introduced them; later cycles re-run all prior gates green. Live harness is graded against a running REAL stack.

cycles.summary: Harden active-memory runtime (expression learning, session events, harder harness)
Close memory substrate loop (source_policy, two-phase restart-recall, vault coherence)
Substrate hardening (dedup, write-lock, error classes, recent-write buffer, process guard)
LifeLoop v2 (pressure, research tasks, consolidation, self-state)
Engine consistency + permissioned autonomous memory-only tasks
Candidate-to-commit lifecycle (Track A in-engine snapshot deferred honestly)
Relational memory field v1 (entities + typed relations, non-authoritative)
Relation inference + grounded relational reasoning (content, not filenames)
Objective relation answering + trust decay + grounded path explanation + contradiction evolution + relation-gap tasks + relation self-state
Release hygiene: ownership attribution, copyright headers, verify_integration.py, .claude memory, em-dash cleanup + style contract, FCE-M runtime docs. No new cognitive features.

Release hygiene completion: PYTHON_HEADER on remaining unheadered non-exempt files (incl sealed/adapter __init__), repo-wide em-dash eradication on the tracked surface (count 0; gitignored runtime/ artifacts out of scope), owned type-hint coverage raised to 100.0 with PEP 563 'from __future__ import annotations', relative->absolute imports across owned packages, style-contract scan widened to dcortex/orchestration/integrations (header+em-dash, no type-hint demand), .mailmap + canonical git identity. No program logic, control flow, or numeric constants changed. No new cognitive features.
cycles.live: not run this cycle (hygiene only; no live-validation claim)

cycles.status: all gates green: verify_integration exit 0, check_style_contract exit 0, ALPHA non-live pytest 546 passed (15 new), owned type-hint 100.0, em-dash 0 tracked, owned relative imports 0; ORCH npm test 700 passed + tsc build clean, memory-service pytest 7 passed (store_batch 3 + FHRSS T1-T4), FHRSS neighbor recovery measured rate 1.0000 at 40% loss.
cycles.notes: Additive only; no parallel engine (BYON stays the single epistemic authority); dcortex/ and vendor/fce_m logic unmodified. NEEDS OWNER CONFIRMATION recorded for FCEM lineage (0.6.x vs v15.7a), GMV audit/embeddings exposure, and FHRSS distributed projection replication + 8-value compression scheme.
cycles.live: not run this cycle (no live stack; no live-validation claim)

cycles.requested: memory-service crash diagnosis + live-stack stability (diagnostic-first: instrument -> reproduce -> root-cause -> fix/mitigate -> honesty-wiring -> gate). No new cognitive behavior; no autonomous load.
cycles.executed: S1 scripts/check_live_stack.py (pre-flight stack health, exit codes 0-5) + tests; S2 scripts/monitor_memory_service.py (crash monitor with RSS/CPU/FD resource time-series) + tests; S5 app/service_supervisor.py hardened (separate pipe-safe stdout/stderr file handles, process diagnostics with redacted env + exit code, bounded opt-in autorestart that marks the run unstable) + run_byon.py wired + tests; S4 scripts/reproduce_memory_service_crash.py (modes search/relation/lifeloop/store-read/mixed/acquisition-store incl. store_batch) + tests; S7 docs/CYCLE14_MEMORY_SERVICE_ROOT_CAUSE.md; S3 live_byon_eval.py ServiceHealthGuard (pre-flight + per-gate health poll + MEMORY_SERVICE_CRASH classification + last_successful_gate/health-trace report fields) + tests; S6 gateway memory_service_up() guard so chat/research return ERROR when memory down (no Claude/local fallback) + status/memory_status + UI panel + tests.
cycles.status: all gates green: verify_integration exit 0 (79 modules), check_style_contract exit 0, ALPHA non-live pytest 587 passed (56 new), em-dash 0 tracked, owned type-hint 100.0. ROOT CAUSE: prime-suspect subprocess unread-PIPE buffer deadlock is EXCLUDED for the canonical launch path (the supervisor and integrate.py already redirect child output to file handles; the deadlock mechanism is positively reproduced in a unit test, and file-handle redirection is the cure). Live evidence: the real memory-service (external v15.7a runtime loaded, shim_used=false) sustained 240 mixed search + store_batch iterations with 0 crashes and alive_end=true (sustained_load_no_crash PROVEN).
cycles.notes: Diagnostic-first, no blind patching. Mitigation is supervisor/Gateway-side only; the sealed engine was NOT modified. A crash is reported as MEMORY_SERVICE_CRASH honestly, never a fake pass. Remaining risk: an engine-internal crash under load not covered by the 240-iter test would be in the sealed engine (diagnosed, not patched); the resource-trend monitor characterizes leak-vs-spike when psutil is present.
cycles.live: memory-service sustained-load proof run (240 iter, 0 crashes); full graded live harness not re-run this cycle

cycles.requested: full-stack live validation: the 178-gate graded harness over real duration with a psutil-backed RSS/CPU/FD monitor; pre-declared P1-P5 thresholds.
cycles.executed: Installed psutil 7.2.2 (added to pyproject app+dev extras). Launched the canonical stack via run_byon.py (pipe-safe), check_live_stack exit 0 (external FCE-M v15.7a runtime loaded). Ran scripts/monitor_memory_service.py (psutil-backed, 5s) over the harness; ran scripts/live_byon_eval.py full set. Fixed one stale gate assertion (batch_write_status checked failed==0 but Cycle-13.3 store_batch returns failed as a LIST; the batch actually succeeded, stored=3, failed=[]) and completed the Cycle-14 ServiceHealthGuard report-fields wiring so the eval report carries stack_health/crash/last_gate.
cycles.status: PASS - all P1-P5 met. P1 178/178 graded gates pass (run 1 was 177/178 on the stale batch assertion, corrected, re-run 178/178). P2 0 crashes, 0 restarts, alive_end true. P3 no fabricated answer / no Claude or local fallback (failure_categories empty, all statuses epistemically valid, no cross-user leak). P4 RSS 558.4->558.6 MB (ratio 1.000, peak 567.4, slope +0.0214 MB/min), FD 4->4 (delta 0); no leak. P5 harness elapsed 22.8 min (>=5). 184 monitor samples.
cycles.notes: Stability PROVEN under the real harness profile (not a 37s scoped replay). The single first-run failure was a test-assertion bug, not a system fault; corrected (not weakened) and re-validated; both runs reported transparently (no best-of-N). No new product logic; the sealed engine was not modified.
cycles.live: 178/178 graded live harness PASS under psutil monitor over ~23 min; 0 crashes

cycles.requested: relation-intelligence layer: per-hop path weighting + explanation v2 (load-free), scheduled relation decay maintenance, LifeLoop integration, autonomous gap-repair routed through the 13.3 acquisition phase with acquisition_context wiring, relation task ingestion, relation self-state v2, UI/API; relation field stays non-authoritative; candidates not truth. Four phases, one commit per phase (no squash).

Phase 2 (741f3d9): TRACK B relation_maintenance.py scheduled decay; TRACK C LifeLoop tick integration (bounded autorun + memory-down guard); TRACK D gap-repair routed through 13.3 acquisition with acquisition_context/repo_root wired lifeloop_run_task -> backend.research -> search.run (project_files cwd-fallback removed so the wiring is load-bearing); TRACK E relation task-result ingestion as candidates. cycles.status: Cycle 15 DONE. Non-live suite 646 passed (60 new across F/G/B/C/D/E/H/I + coverage), em-dash 0, verify_integration exit 0, check_style exit 0. LIVE: all 25 Cycle-15 gates pass against a real stack (validated by executing _cycle15_suite live, not unit fixtures); routing proof is live (an ungrounded question reaches the acquisition phase; the acquisition record is emitted only by EpistemicSearch.run). HONEST FINDING: project_files is live-dormant because a project/self-term question is grounded by committed canonical memory and returns KNOWN before acquisition (correct precedence, memory wins); project_files firing is proven at unit level with empty memory (test_gap_repair_passes_acquisition_context_repo_root), and the repo_root wiring is real. Extended-profile stability (Cycle 14.1 follow-up): 278 psutil samples over ~37 min of the live harness, 0 crashes, RSS 558.2->561.0 MB (ratio 1.005, peak 572.5, slope +0.085 MB/min, no leak).
cycles.notes: Relation field never a truth authority; LifeLoop never answers the user; task results are candidates, never committed; memory-only gaps auto-run, web gaps require permission, secret-derived gaps create no task; maintenance never deletes (decay-on-read) and is skipped when the memory-service is down. PRE-EXISTING non-Cycle-15 failures in this live run (NOT regressions, NOT faked): read_consistency_mode_active and vault_active_vs_tombstoned_counts (Cycle-5 gates) failed on environment state (vault not trained in this run; client read_consistency_mode None) - untouched by Cycle 15.
cycles.live: 25/25 Cycle-15 gates PASS live; 2 pre-existing Cycle-5 gates failed on environment (documented)
